Home.title: The 17 Goals
Home.caption: EARTHROPY · v0.0.2
Home.mission: Earthropy is a forever-free, corporation-agnostic platform for coordinating work on the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals. Built for NGOs, researchers, and local communities — the people the work depends on, in the languages they actually speak.

signup.heading: Create an account
signup.subheading: Join the platform coordinating global action on the SDGs.

verifyEmail.heading: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.description: Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account.

magicLink.heading: Sign in
magicLink.description: Click the button below to sign in to your account.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link if an account exists.

resetPassword.heading: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.

checkYourEmail.heading: Check your email
checkYourEmail.description: We've sent you an email. Follow the link inside to continue.

dashboard.placeholder: Your dashboard is being built. Check back soon.
